2.q: The changing of Ca2+ is sensed by Salt Overly Sensitive3 (SOS3), the critical component of the SOS pathway that excludes Na+ from the cytosol.

3.q: Expression of the wild-type MpSOS3 but not the mutated nonmyristoylated MpSOS3-G2A could rescue the salt-hypersensitive phenotype of the Arabidopsis sos3-1 mutant.

4.q: the 35S::MpCML40 transgenic Arabidopsis had a higher level of proline even before salt treatment, which revealed that MpCML40 could contribute to proline accumulation for salt tolerance.
